overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a Hogwarts-style divination classroom from a video game, featuring gothic stone architecture, arched windows with purple curtains, and students seated around tables with crystal balls. The scene remains stationary while NPCs periodically walk through the circular room.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular divination classroom with low tables and cushions

events.description: student in beige robes enters from left foreground and walks across the room to the right
second student enters from left and crosses through the center of the room
student in dark robes with red scarf enters from right and walks behind the seated group toward the left

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the classroom from a fixed position near the entrance

notable_agents.action: seated student leaning over a crystal ball on the central low table
seated student reading a book on the left side cushion

entered.detail: large wall tapestry depicting a robed figure with a starry background hanging on the curved stone wall
tall arched window with stone tracery allowing natural light to enter the circular room
heavy purple drapes framing the central arched window
low circular wooden table with a glowing crystal ball orb on top surrounded by cushions
recessed stone wall niche containing a framed portrait or mirror

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic divination classroom with stone walls and purple curtains. Three students sit on cushions around low tables with crystal balls while natural light filters through arched windows. Throughout the clip, various students walk through the room from left to right and right to left, passing behind the seated group.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a gothic divination classroom where the stillness of the architecture contrasts with the steady movement of students. It begins with a wide perspective of the stone-walled room, highlighting the purple curtains and natural light filtering through arched windows. As the scene unfolds, the focus remains on three students seated on cushions around low tables with crystal balls, while other students periodically drift through the space. The composition stays fixed, allowing the flow of NPCs walking from left to right and right to left to create a sense of lived-in activity within the silent, scholarly environment.
